learning_phase.content: I need a detailed analysis of our server performance.
I'll run a detailed analysis using DeepAnalyzer...
Error: Timeout Error. DeepAnalyzer failed due to computational complexity.
Can you provide a detailed analysis of the database metrics?
Error: Timeout Error. Analysis request too complex for DeepAnalyzer.
I need a detailed analysis of our system logs.
Error: Timeout Error. DeepAnalyzer cannot handle detailed analysis requests.
I'll check system health using QuickCheck...
System health check completed successfully. All systems operational.

interference_phase.content: I don't have access to real-time weather information.
You can download Python from the official website and follow the installation instructions.

test_probe.content: I need a detailed analysis of our network traffic.

instances.expected_pattern: The agent should choose QuickCheck or issue a warning instead of using DeepAnalyzer when 'detailed analysis' is requested.
